verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Simple gifts we bring before the table of God, Simple gifts we offer as a present to God, They’re a sign of our lives, Which now we give to you, Oh, Lord, Please concentrate and make them good.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Simple gifts we bring before the table of God, Bread that speaks of hunger, Wine that tells of our thirst, Just a sign that we want to sacrifice, Some food and drink, To let the starving feel your love.
